name: tuturuuu
description: Codex operating guidance, browser and Vercel troubleshooting, external app integrations, CMS studio workflows, satellite app UX, native E2E auth debugging, scoped commits, CLI support, devbox operations, validation offload, CI, and focused workflows for the Tuturuuu platform monorepo.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Tuturuuu platform work aligned with repo conventions.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills for safe Tuturuuu platform development, including repo-wide workflow rules, authenticated browser and Vercel CLI production troubleshooting, evidence-driven product improvement and performance diagnosis, external app auth/upload/delivery integrations, CMS and branded content studio guidance, standalone satellite app UX, native-machine local E2E auth debugging, apps/web release badge metadata guidance, dedicated shared-worktree agent coordination with parallel subagent lanes, generated-artifact ownership, archived context support, completed-note archiving, short 5-10-minute commit-window claim/wait/release coordination, scoped Conventional Commit follow-through, proof-gated no-verify commit evidence, native ttr CLI install and SDK-backed workflows, devbox runner operations, heavy validation offload guidance, focused ttr task workflows, task templates, finance CRUD, finance read diagnostics, pagination commands, wrapped finance response normalization, ttr-first task capture, Flutter mobile task-board guidance, Supabase database patterns, CI/docs maintenance, release-please merge automation, PR quiet-window merge sync with a hard main-green gate before production sync, package release auto-recovery, Supabase CLI setup retry, Codecov coverage retry, review-comment follow-through, plugin validation, and incremental tooling improvements.
defaultPrompt: Build this external app or CMS editor flow with Tuturuuu auth and content delivery.
Upgrade this satellite app UX and troubleshoot its app-session flow with browser and Vercel evidence.
Fix this Flutter task-board or native local E2E auth behavior and verify it.
Fix this platform release badge metadata and run the checks it needs.
Check finance reads with the ttr CLI and fix the SDK helper if needed.
Add this as a Tuturuuu task or reusable task template with the ttr CLI.
Update the Supabase schema or API write path safely.
Coordinate worktree, devbox validation, tooling docs, review comments, commit, merge PR after main green.
